note: Events pulled from public Warrenville listings. Always links back to the official source. Refreshed weekly by the automation.

events.title: Storytime at Cerny Park Pavilion
events.blurb: A free all-ages storytime under the Cerny Park pavilion to start the week. A simple, sweet summer-morning tradition for families. Storytimes can move to the library or shift with the weather, so check the listing first.

events.title: 4th of July Parade & Celebration
events.time: Parade July 3 at 6:00 PM, Cerny Park festivities through July 4
events.location: Parade from Warren Avenue & Tracy Place to Cerny Park
events.blurb: Warrenville's two-day hometown celebration. The parade steps off downtown at 6:00 on July 3 and rolls to Cerny Park for an evening of festivities (6:00 to 11:00 PM). The fun picks back up on the Fourth with a kids parade and live music from noon right up to the fireworks. The 2026 celebration is centered at Cerny Park, so plan your spot.

events.title: Firecracker 5K Run / Walk
events.blurb: Start the Fourth with a scenic 5K along the Illinois Prairie Path and Warrenville Grove Forest Preserve. Runners, walkers, and strollers are all welcome. Registration tends to fill up, so sign up early.

events.title: Concerts on the Commons: Abby Kay Band
events.location: Bob Walters Commons (next to the Library)
events.blurb: The library's free Wednesday-evening concert series returns to Bob Walters Commons after the holiday week, with the Abby Kay Band on the bill. Pack a picnic and a lawn chair (no alcohol, please), and a food truck is usually on hand.

events.title: Unplug Illinois Picnic in the Park
events.blurb: Put the screens down and come out for a community picnic. Games, food, and neighbors enjoying a summer afternoon together. Confirm the time with the Park District before you go.

events.title: Concerts on the Commons: Billy Elton
events.location: Bob Walters Commons (next to the Library)
events.blurb: A tribute night at the free library concert series, with Billy Elton bringing the Elton John and Billy Joel songbook to Bob Walters Commons. Bring a chair and a picnic and settle in for the evening.

events.title: Summer Movies in the Park
events.blurb: An outdoor movie night under the stars at Cerny Park. Free, family-friendly, and a great excuse to spread out a blanket with some snacks. Confirm the title and start time with the Park District.

events.title: Concerts on the Commons: Latin Swing Factor
events.location: Bob Walters Commons (next to the Library)
events.blurb: Latin Swing Factor brings a lively mix of Latin rhythms and swing to the library's free Wednesday concert on Bob Walters Commons. A fun one to dance to on a summer evening.

events.title: Concerts on the Commons: Beyond the Blonde
events.location: Bob Walters Commons (next to the Library)
events.blurb: The free Concerts on the Commons series rolls on with Beyond the Blonde at Bob Walters Commons. Pack a picnic, grab a lawn chair, and enjoy live music next to the library.

events.title: National Night Out Against Crime
events.blurb: Warrenville's police department hosts this free community night with food, kids' activities, touch-a-truck, music, and a chance to meet the neighbors and first responders who keep the town safe. A friendly summer-evening tradition.

events.title: Summer Daze
events.location: Warrenville City Hall Complex, 28W701 Stafford Place
events.source: City of Warrenville / Western DuPage Chamber
events.blurb: Warrenville's signature summer festival. Live music, food and drink, kids' rides and games, and local business booths. The weekend the whole town turns out.

events.title: Warrenville Car Show
events.blurb: Classic cars and showpieces roll into Summer Daze. A favorite for car lovers and anyone who likes a good Saturday stroll past some shine.

events.title: Art on the Prairie
events.blurb: A weekend celebration of local and regional artists, music, and makers, and the community's kickoff to fall. Warrenville's nod to its deep arts roots.
